notes: Baseline handoff is minimal but functional. Missing structured sections for reliable cross-session continuity.
With-skill achieves 100% pass rate across all 19 assertions vs 15.1% baseline — the skill adds substantial structure that vanilla Claude does not produce.
continues-correct-task passes in both configurations — measures basic reading comprehension, not skill value. Non-discriminating assertion.
recognizes-budget-pressure and no-new-tasks-started pass in both configurations — follow from user's explicit instruction, not the skill. Non-discriminating.
With-skill runs cost ~2x tokens and ~2.5x time. Trade-off: comprehensive structured documentation vs quick implementation-focused response.
Biggest skill differential is in resume test (100% vs 16.7%) — structured resume protocol with Entire archaeology is the skill's most unique value.
